settings.pageSubtitle: Manage your profile and default coaching preferences.

coachingMode.title: Default Coaching Mode
coachingMode.description: Sets the default session type when booking new sessions.

online.label: Online Only
online.description: All sessions conducted remotely via video call.

in_person.label: In-Person
in_person.description: All sessions at the gym or client's location.

hybrid.label: Hybrid
hybrid.description: Mix of online and in-person based on client needs.

dashboard.logEntriesHint: Log entries per client — click pills to compare
dashboard.weightTrendHint: 8-week history — click a pill to show / hide
dashboard.classificationHint: Auto-calculated weekly · Drag a client into a different tier to reclassify

serious.label: Serious
serious.suggestion: Celebrate them — they're your best marketing.

active.label: Active
active.suggestion: Keep momentum. Light check-in this week.

casual.label: Casual
casual.suggestion: Send a nudge. Ask if schedule has changed.

schedule.clickToJump: Click any day to jump to that week

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyUnreadSub: Every client update has been reviewed.
notifications.emptyAllSub: Hit Simulate to see how incoming client updates appear.
